title: Multi-Layer Phishing Detection System: URL-Based, Vision, and LLM Orchestration
excerpt: A comprehensive multi-layer approach combining URL analysis, vision-based detection, and LLM orchestration for robust phishing detection in modern email systems.

title: Vision-Based Phishing Detection: Image Analysis in Modern Email Systems
excerpt: Exploring advanced computer vision techniques for identifying malicious content, obfuscation patterns, and suspicious visual elements in email attachments and HTML content.

title: LLM-Based Security Orchestration: Intelligent Threat Detection Framework
excerpt: A novel framework for using Large Language Models as intelligent orchestrators in multi-layer security systems, dynamically routing threats and optimizing detection strategies.
